reason: Tweet celebrates mass casualties (1000+ in one day, 4500+ in one month) using derogatory sectarian term 'rafidi' (رافضي) which is commonly used by ISIS against Shia Muslims. The hashtag refers to mass killing of 'rawafid' (Shia), indicating support for sectarian violence typical of ISIS ideology.
original_post: قتل واصيب أكثر من 1000رافضي بيوم واحد ومن محور واحد وان عدد القتلى تجاوز4500في شهر واحد ولله الحمد #جرف_الصخر_محرقة_الروافض
